shortcuts._comment: Example override (default is ctrl+shift+l). Note: alt+shift+tab is OS window-switch on Windows; use a different key if running pi on Windows.

bashPatterns._comment_safe: Replace-only: providing safePatterns replaces ALL defaults. Omit to keep built-in safe patterns.
bashPatterns._comment_destructive: Replace-only: providing destructivePatterns replaces ALL defaults. Omit to keep built-in destructive patterns.
